Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Microgpt 1803 upvotes, 302 comments
  2. Microgpt explained interactively 267 upvotes, 37 comments
  3. Decision trees – the unreasonable power of nested decision rules 477 upvotes, 74 comments
  4. Computer-generated dream world: Virtual reality for a 286 processor 89 upvotes, 10 comments
  5. Show HN: Timber – Ollama for classical ML models, 336x faster than Python 120 upvotes, 16 comments
  6. C64 Copy Protection 55 upvotes, 6 comments
  7. Making Video Games in 2025 (without an engine) 74 upvotes, 10 comments
  8. Everett shuts down Flock camera network after judge rules footage public record 219 upvotes, 44 comments
  9. Flightradar24 for Ships 227 upvotes, 46 comments
  10. Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS Foundation 337 upvotes, 94 comments
  11. Right-sizes LLM models to your system's RAM, CPU, and GPU 128 upvotes, 31 comments
  12. Ghostty – Terminal Emulator 724 upvotes, 311 comments
  13. Next-gen spacecraft are overwhelming communication networks 62 upvotes, 19 comments
  14. Have your cake and decompress it too 17 upvotes, 3 comments
  15. Tove Jansson's criticized illustrations of The Hobbit (2023) 172 upvotes, 79 comments
  16. The Mini PET 40/80 (2022) 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  17. WebMCP is available for early preview 276 upvotes, 155 comments
  18. How to record and retrieve anything you've ever had to look up twice 36 upvotes, 14 comments
  19. Little Free Library 114 upvotes, 61 comments
  20. When does MCP make sense vs CLI? 372 upvotes, 237 comments
  21. Ape Coding [fiction] 174 upvotes, 116 comments
  22. Why XML tags are so fundamental to Claude 201 upvotes, 137 comments
  23. Enable CORS for Your Blog 27 upvotes, 12 comments
  24. Why does C have the best file API 107 upvotes, 81 comments
  25. Evolving descriptive text of mental content from human brain activity 22 upvotes, 11 comments
  26. An interactive intro to Elliptic Curve Cryptography 14 upvotes, 7 comments
  27. If AI writes code, should the session be part of the commit? 221 upvotes, 225 comments
  28. Process-Based Concurrency: Why Beam and OTP Keep Being Right 24 upvotes, 18 comments
  29. Setting up phones is a nightmare 150 upvotes, 193 comments
